about.title: About Ultimate Physique
about.subtitle: Local-first fitness assessment — clear scoring, long-term progress tracking.
about.missionBody: Transparent, deterministic fitness scoring for everyday training decisions.
about.localDataBody: Dyno logs and detailed assessment records stay on this device only. Core local features (assessments, radar, logs, tools) work fully without a subscription.
about.disclaimerBody: Fitness self-tracking only — not medical diagnosis, treatment, or emergency guidance.
about.contactBody: Product questions or feedback: use in-app support channel.
